description: Contributing to the development of a large-scale e-commerce and CRM platform that unifies customer management, order processing, analytics, inventory tracking, affiliate management, and business operations.
highlights: Designing and implementing scalable backend services using NestJS, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL with modular architecture and domain-driven design principles.
Building RESTful APIs for authentication, customer management, product catalogues, order workflows, payments, inventory management, analytics, and administrative operations.
Developing responsive and high-performance frontend applications using Next.js, React, and TypeScript with strong focus on user experience, maintainability, and SEO.
Working with PostgreSQL and Prisma ORM to design schemas, optimize queries, manage migrations, and maintain data integrity across complex business workflows.
Contributing to AI-powered solutions through OCR, intelligent document processing, automation workflows, and large language model integrations.

description: Designed and developed full-stack applications across web, desktop, and mobile-oriented workflows, combining MERN development with Python, Django, AI integrations, and deployment responsibilities.
highlights: Built full-stack web applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js with responsive and scalable user experiences.
Developed and maintained RESTful APIs, authentication systems, authorization flows, and optimized database operations for performance and reliability.
Worked with SQL and PostgreSQL databases, including schema design, complex queries, and improved data management workflows.
Developed backend services and web applications using Python and Django with maintainable architecture and efficient API design.
Deployed and maintained applications on VPS environments and contributed to AI-powered products involving OCR, document scanning, automation, and LLM capabilities.

description: Worked on freelance and self-initiated product builds, turning ideas into polished portfolio-ready applications with strong UI execution, responsive layouts, and practical full-stack features.
highlights: Designed and built modern landing pages, dashboards, and interactive product experiences for practice, experimentation, and client-style delivery.
Focused on frontend polish, reusable components, responsive behavior, animation, and clean developer experience.
Expanded practical full-stack skills by shipping mini products with authentication, CRUD flows, APIs, and deployment workflows.

description: Contributed to the frontend experience of a collaborative workspace and resource management platform, focusing on responsive UI, dashboard usability, and polished interaction design.
highlights: Developed responsive dashboard interfaces to improve usability and accessibility across devices.
Implemented animated UI interactions using Framer Motion to create a smoother and more engaging product experience.
Built reusable frontend components and structured layouts to support workspace, resource, and documentation flows.
